title: Velvety Rich Jamaican Egg Yolk Tagine
description: A low-glycemic, earthy, and silky Jamaican dish featuring egg yolks, deglaze-fond, and rich flavors, cooked in a ceramic tagine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a ceramic tagine, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is lightly browned, stirring occasionally.
Add the diced scotch bonnet peppers, minced garlic, and grated ginger, and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, dried thyme, and a pinch of salt, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the egg yolks and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
Remove the tagine from the heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
